term: Once A Cheater Always A Cheater
englishDefinitions: the belief that someone who has cheated before will probably cheat again
a saying used to express distrust of a person's honesty in relationships
persianTranslation: کسی که یک‌بار خیانت کرده، باز هم خیانت می‌کند
examples: Some people say once a cheater always a cheater.
I don't fully agree with the saying once a cheater always a cheater.
She remembered the phrase once a cheater always a cheater and stayed cautious.
